title: Avoid overly complex expressions
description: Complex expressions with multiple logical operators become difficult to read and understand. High expression complexity increases the likelihood of logic errors and makes code maintenance more challenging.
recommendation: Break complex expressions into simpler, intermediate variables or separate conditions.

noncompliant.description: Complex expressions with multiple operators are difficult to read and maintain.

compliant.description: Break complex expressions into intermediate variables and extract logical components into separate functions.

checks.message: Complex expression detected: Break into intermediate variables or separate conditions. Consider extracting logic into helper functions for better readability.
